Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: hydraulic structures by function [300006112], hydraulic structures [300006073], single built works by function [300004894], single built works by specific type [300004795], single built works (built environment) [300004790], Single Built Works (hierarchy name) [300004789], Built Environment (hierarchy name) [300264550], Objects Facet [300264092]

Non-Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: barriers [300005043], barriers and barrier elements [300163880], architectural elements [300000885], components by specific context [300241584], components (objects parts) [300241583], Components (hierarchy name) [300241490], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Barriers to confine, control, or obstruct the flow of water. One typical use of a dam is to raise the level of water significantly for water storage in a reservoir.

Source.Source_ID: 2000114964/World Commission on Dams, Dams and Development (2000)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: Barreras para confinar, controlar u obstruir el flujo de agua.
Wordt gebruikt voor hindernissen om de waterstroom te beperken, te controleren of tegen te houden.
Barriere, um Wasser einfassen, kontrollieren oder seinen Fluss regeln zu können.
Barreiras para confinar, controlar ou obstruir o fluxo de água.
侷限、控制或阻擋水流的屏障。水壩典型的用途之一為顯著地提高水位，以便在水庫儲水。

Source.Source_ID: 2000039651/Canadian Thesaurus of Construction Science and Technology (1978)
